Crop Name: mungbean

Profile
- Season type: short-season (TSUM total=1453 C.d)
- Temperature adaptation: warm-adapted (TBASEM=10.00 C)
- Development driver: temperature + daylength (IDSL=1, DLO=1.00 h)
- Root/water trait: moderately deep-rooted, moderately drought-tolerant (RDMCR=100.00 cm, DEPNR=3.50)
- Assimilation trait: lower assimilation potential (AMAX peak=37.00)
- Storage allocation: late storage allocation (FOTB onset DVS=1.45)

Nutrient capacity proxies (leaf maxima)
- NMAXLV: DVS0=0.0600, DVS1=0.0450
- PMAXLV: DVS0=0.0046, DVS1=0.0034
- KMAXLV: DVS0=0.0450, DVS1=0.0338

Use guidance
- Treat this as prior knowledge for zero-shot policy transfer.
- Final action should still adapt to current weather/soil observations.
